-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----

I can verify that I was also experiencing this problem. The patch
supplied in this PR works for me and I can use distccd again without
the segfault. This was on FreeBSD/amd64 8-CURRENT.

- --
Coleman Kane
